backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Aurelie Fine Jewellery backend, defining all data types (Product, Order, Category, etc.) and storing application state using Maps for products, orders, inquiries, site content, and more.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two fixes needed for GirlsHomePage: rendering uploaded category header images in the sliding circles (instead of emoji fallbacks), and correcting the page body background color to match other customer-facing pages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, documenting recent changes and responsibilities of components, pages, and hooks across the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes, including background, foreground, card, primary, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Aurelie Fine Jewellery Mobile App', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with lazy-loaded routes for all pages (home, girls, boys, categories, admin, checkout, etc.), wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and uses Layout as the root route component.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerMana: An admin panel component for managing scrolling banner messages, supporting add, edit, toggle enabled/disabled, delete, and reorder operations via backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/BoysHeader: Admin component for managing circular category images and redirect URLs for the Boys section sub-categories in the header navigation. Supports image upload with optimization and progress tracking, and saves headers per category slug.
frontend/src/components/admin/CarouselMa: Admin component for managing up to 5 homepage carousel slides, supporting image upload/optimization, URL editing, enable/disable toggling, and slide reordering.
frontend/src/components/admin/CategoryCa: Admin component for managing images and redirect URLs for a specific category carousel (index 1 or 2), supporting adding, removing, reordering, and saving up to 5 images.
frontend/src/components/admin/CategoryIm: Reusable admin component for managing a category's image gallery (up to 10 images), with support for uploading, removing, reordering, and setting a primary thumbnail image.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeaderCate: Admin component for managing circular category images and redirect URLs for the main header navigation row, mirroring the Boys variant but using PRODUCT_CATEGORIES.
frontend/src/components/admin/InquiryMan: Admin component that lists customer inquiries fetched via React Query and allows admins to submit text responses to pending inquiries with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin component that displays all orders with status badges, allows status updates via a dropdown, and supports printing individual order details in a styled pop-up window.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: Modal dialog for creating or editing a product, handling fields like name, price, category, gender, and media uploads (images/video) with optimization before submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductMan: Admin panel component that lists all products with edit and delete actions, using a confirmation dialog for deletion and delegating create/edit to ProductFormModal.
frontend/src/components/admin/SiteConten: Admin form component for viewing and updating site-wide content such as contact info, social media URLs, and static text pages like terms and privacy policy.
frontend/src/components/CategoryCarousel: Reusable carousel component that fetches enabled slides for a given category, auto-rotates every 3 seconds (pausing on hover), and supports manual navigation with previous/next arrows and dot indicators.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageCar: A carousel component for displaying category-specific images with auto-rotation, manual navigation, and optional click-through redirect URL support.
frontend/src/components/CategoryProductR: A horizontally scrollable row of product cards filtered by category slug and optional gender, showing image, name, and price.
frontend/src/components/checkout/CouponC: Checkout component that lets users enter, validate, and apply or remove a coupon code, displaying a 10% discount confirmation when a valid code is applied.
frontend/src/components/checkout/UpiQrCo: Renders a UPI payment QR code image fetched from qrserver.com API and provides a button to copy the UPI URI to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/CustomerPageStyl: A simple wrapper component that adds a `data-customer-page` attribute to scope customer-facing styles.
frontend/src/components/FilterIconButton: An icon button that opens a filter panel, displaying a badge with the count of active filters.
frontend/src/components/FilterPanel.tsx: A slide-out sheet panel with draft-state filter controls for metal type, price range, occasion, and sort order, applied on explicit confirmation.
frontend/src/components/footer/FooterSys: Site footer component that displays the brand logo, quick navigation links, and contact/social info fetched from the backend via React Query.
frontend/src/components/GenderCategoryTa: A navigation tab bar with 'For Him' and 'For Her' tabs that route to `/boys` and `/girls` respectively, hidden on admin routes.
frontend/src/components/HeaderCategoryNa: A horizontal scrollable category navigation bar showing circular category images fetched from the backend, with configurable redirect URLs.
frontend/src/components/HomeCarousel.tsx: A full-width home page hero carousel with directional slide transitions, auto-rotation, hover pause, and clickable slide redirects.
frontend/src/components/HomeCategoryCaro: A page section that renders two image carousels and a product row for each product category in a stacked layout.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component that renders the sticky header with navigation, search bar, auth controls, cart icon, and wraps page content with a footer and marquee banner. Handles login/logout via Internet Identity and admin route detection.
frontend/src/components/MarqueeBanner.ts: Displays a horizontally scrolling marquee banner with enabled promotional messages fetched from the backend, styled with a gold gradient. Returns null if no messages are available.
frontend/src/components/MasonryProductGr: Renders a masonry-style product grid with staggered entrance animations using IntersectionObserver, showing product cards with image, price, and add-to-cart/buy-now actions. Supports varied aspect ratios for visual variety.
frontend/src/components/NewArrivalsSecti: Horizontally scrollable section displaying the latest product arrivals fetched via a query hook, with each card showing an image, name, price, and an add-to-cart button. Shows a skeleton loading state while data is fetching.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailModal: Modal dialog that displays full order details including status, items, and pricing, and allows users to cancel an order by selecting a reason from a dropdown. Uses cancellability checks and shows appropriate status icons and badges.
frontend/src/components/OurStoryStrip.ts: A full-width decorative brand story section with a background image, gold accents, and animated text that fades in on scroll using IntersectionObserver. Includes a call-to-action button navigating to the contact page.
frontend/src/components/ProductFilterBar: A filter bar component for the product listing page that provides dropdowns for metal type, price range, occasion, and sort order, along with an active filter count badge and a clear-all button.
frontend/src/components/ProductMediaCaro: A media carousel component for product detail pages that displays a video (if present) followed by images in a square aspect ratio, with navigation arrows and dot indicators.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name, email, phone, and address to create their profile via the backend actor, granting admin access if the admin email is used.
frontend/src/components/RecentlyViewedSe: A horizontally scrollable section that displays recently viewed products (tracked via a custom hook) with thumbnail images, names, and prices, showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/RouteLoadingFall: A skeleton placeholder layout shown while lazy-loaded route components are being fetched, rendering a header skeleton and a three-column card grid skeleton.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: A full-screen splash screen that displays the Aurelie logo and brand name with a zoom animation, then calls an onComplete callback after 1.5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupModal: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUiBodyAttribu: Hook that sets a `data-admin-ui` attribute on `document.body` while an admin route is mounted, enabling scoped CSS for Radix UI portals.
frontend/src/hooks/useBannerQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting banner messages via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with persistence for managing a shopping cart, supporting add, remove, update quantity, clear, and total calculations.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryCarouselQu: React Query hooks for fetching and updating category carousel images and redirect URLs via the backend actor.
React Query hooks for fetching all category headers or a single category header, and a mutation hook for setting a category header.
frontend/src/hooks/useFooterVariant.ts: Trivial hook that always returns the `'split'` footer variant with no state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductFilters.ts: Custom React hook that filters and sorts a list of products by metal type, price range, and occasion, and tracks the count of active filters.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, admin status, categories, carousel slides, products, orders, and inquiries.
frontend/src/hooks/useRecentlyViewed.ts: Custom hook that persists and manages a list of recently viewed product IDs (up to 10) in localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the Aurelie brand color system, and adds utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and InternetIdentity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBannerPage: Admin page for banner management that checks caller admin status and renders the BannerManagement component, showing an access denied screen for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCarouselPa: Admin page for carousel management that verifies admin privileges and renders the CarouselManagement component, with access denied and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminCategories: Admin page for category navigation management that renders both HeaderCategoryNavManagement (girls) and BoysHeaderCategoryNavManagement components after verifying admin access.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminInquiriesP: Admin page for inquiry management that checks admin privileges and renders the InquiryManagement component, with access denied and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Admin orders page that lists all orders with filtering by date range and month/year, supports order status updates, and displays order details including product names and cancellation reasons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminProductsPa: Admin page for product management that verifies admin privileges and renders the ProductManagement component, with access denied and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminSiteConten: Admin page for site content management that checks admin privileges and renders the SiteContentManagement component, with access denied and loading states.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CategoryEditPag: Admin page for editing a specific category by slug, allowing updates to name, description, display order, and images, with form state initialized from fetched category data.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that verifies the caller's admin status and renders navigation cards linking to admin sub-sections like products, orders, carousel, and categories.
frontend/src/pages/BoysHomePage.tsx: Homepage for the men's jewellery section that displays animated category circles fetched from backend headers, navigating to category pages or redirect URLs on click.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays the shopping cart with item list, quantity controls, and remove buttons, requiring authentication. Shows empty/login states and formats prices in INR.
frontend/src/pages/categories/AnkletsPag: Renders the Anklets category page using CategoryPageTemplate with the 'anklets' slug and a brief description.
frontend/src/pages/categories/boys/BoysB: Renders the Boys Bracelet category page using CategoryPageTemplate with a 'boys' gender filter.
frontend/src/pages/categories/boys/BoysC: Renders the Boys Chains category page using CategoryPageTemplate with a 'boys' gender filter.
frontend/src/pages/categories/boys/BoysL: Renders the Boys Lab Diamonds category page using CategoryPageTemplate with a 'boys' gender filter.
frontend/src/pages/categories/boys/BoysR: Renders the Boys Rings category page using CategoryPageTemplate with a 'boys' gender filter.
frontend/src/pages/categories/BridalJewe: Renders the Bridal Jewellery category page using CategoryPageTemplate with the 'bridal-jewellery' slug and description.
frontend/src/pages/categories/CategoryNo: Empty file intended for a category-not-found page with no implementation.
frontend/src/pages/categories/CategoryPa: Reusable template component for category pages that fetches products, applies gender and category filters, supports filtering/sorting via a side panel, and renders a masonry product grid with add-to-cart and buy-now actions.
frontend/src/pages/categories/EarringsPa: Renders the Earrings category page using CategoryPageTemplate with the 'earrings' slug and description.
frontend/src/pages/categories/LabGrownDi: Renders the Lab Diamonds category page using CategoryPageTemplate with the 'lab-diamonds-jewellery' slug and description.
frontend/src/pages/categories/NecklacePa: Renders the Necklaces category page using CategoryPageTemplate with the 'necklace' slug and description.
Renders the Rings category page using CategoryPageTemplate with the 'rings' slug and description.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Multi-step checkout page handling shipping address entry, coupon application, and UPI payment submission to create an order. Computes discounted totals and generates UPI URIs for payment.
frontend/src/pages/ContactDetailsPage.ts: Displays store contact information (phone, email, address, hours, social links) fetched from the backend actor. Renders a styled read-only contact info page with a back button.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Authenticated contact form page that lets users submit inquiries (name, email, message) to the backend. Shows a login-required state for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboardPage: Customer dashboard showing order history and inquiries in tabs, with order status badges and a detail modal. Requires authentication and displays stats overview cards.
frontend/src/pages/GirlsHomePage.tsx: Home page for the girls/jewellery section displaying a 3-column animated category grid with images or emoji fallbacks. Navigates to category pages or custom redirect URLs on click.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page that composes the home carousel, new arrivals, category carousels, and recently viewed sections into a full-page layout.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays a logged-in customer's order history with status badges and timestamps, and opens an order detail modal on row click.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: A static error page shown after a failed payment, offering buttons to return to the cart or go back to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: A static confirmation page shown after a successful payment, summarizing next steps and linking to the orders dashboard or home page.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Fetches and renders the site's privacy policy text from the backend, showing a loading spinner while data is in flight.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCategoryPage.t: Displays a filtered grid of products for a given category slug, with add-to-cart, buy-now, and view-details actions per product.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Shows full details for a single product including a media carousel, price, quantity selector, and add-to-cart/buy-now buttons, while also recording the product as recently viewed.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileDetailsPage.ts: Allows an authenticated user to view and edit their profile fields (name, email, phone, address, DOB) with validation and save via a backend mutation.
frontend/src/pages/ShippingPolicyPage.ts: Fetches and renders the site's shipping policy text from the backend, showing a loading spinner while data is in flight.
frontend/src/pages/TermsConditionsPage.t: Displays the Terms & Conditions page by fetching site content via a query hook and rendering the termsOfService text, with a loading spinner while fetching.
frontend/src/utils/device.ts: Provides a utility function to detect whether the user is on a mobile device using the modern userAgentData API with a user-agent string fallback.
frontend/src/utils/mediaOptimization.ts: Provides client-side utilities to resize and compress images via canvas before upload, and a passthrough helper for video files.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Centralizes checkout pricing logic including subtotal calculation, coupon validation (code AFJ10 for 10% off), discount computation, and INR formatting.
frontend/src/utils/productCategories.ts: Defines all product category metadata for girls and boys, exports combined lists, and provides helper functions to look up, validate, and get option lists for categories.
frontend/src/utils/upi.ts: Provides utilities to generate UPI deep-link URIs for payments, including generic UPI, Google Pay, and PhonePe links targeting a specific payee.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (bottle-green, blood-maroon, navy, gold, beige, silver), border radius, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Aurelie Fine Jewellery project, recording two known issues to fix: category circle images not syncing on the For Her page and an incorrect body background color on that same page.
